description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a prominent front porch supported by white columns and adorned with decorative railings. The lower level includes a covered entryway, large front windows, and a garage door, while the upper level has a partially open balcony and several windows. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of horizontal siding and brick, with a flat roof design. The property is set on a paved lot with a tiled walkway leading to the entrance and a driveway extending to the garage. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal decorative elements. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, making it suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A two-story house with a covered front porch, garage, and a mix of brick and siding exterior, featuring a flat roof and open balcony.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch with columns, main entrance, large windows, and garage door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open balcony, brick wall, and the transition from porch to the upper level.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows and a plain siding finish, showing the back of the house and part of the driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the upper balcony, side windows, and the continuation of the flat roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with white columns, steps, and a central door flanked by large windows
